ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* European size equivalent */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* United States size equivalent */,
  "alpha_size" TEXT /* Alpha size representation (e.g., XS, SMALL) */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* United Kingdom size equivalent */,
  "japan_size" INTEGER /* Japan size equivalent */,
  "australia_size" INTEGER /* Australia size equivalent */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size conversion data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chest_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chest measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding size entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding brand */,
  "chest_inch" INTEGER /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "chest_cm" INTEGER /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the chest measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chest_measurements_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chest_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleeve_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleeve measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding size entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding brand */,
  "sleeve_inch" INTEGER /* Sleeve measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_cm" INTEGER /* Sleeve measurement in centimeters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sleeve measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleeve_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleeve_measurements_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waist_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waist measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding size entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding brand */,
  "waist_inch" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "waist_cm" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the waist measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waist_measurements_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waist_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing brand */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the brand information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brand_size_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand size guide */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing brand */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding size entry */,
  "fitting_tips" TEXT /* Fitting tips and additional information for the size */,
  "hip_measurement_cm" INTEGER /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_measurement_inch" INTEGER /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_measurement_cm" INTEGER /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_measurement_inch" INTEGER /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size guide was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_size_guides_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_size_guides_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_system" TEXT /* Preferred sizing system of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the customer */,
  "last_measurement_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer's measurements were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding customer */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement provided by the customer */,
  "sleeve" INTEGER /* Sleeve measurement provided by the customer */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement provided by the customer */,
  "hip" INTEGER /* Hip measurement provided by the customer */,
  "shoulder" INTEGER /* Shoulder measurement provided by the customer */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement used (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer's measurements were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding customer */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing brand */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "hip_size_id" INTEGER /* Recommended hip size for the customer */,
  "shoulder_size_id" INTEGER /* Recommended shoulder size for the customer */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_hip_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("hip_size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_shoulder_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("shoulder_size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction log */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding customer */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction with the tool */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the interaction */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the customer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_usage_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., tool usage count, conversion rate) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., usage, conversion) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., tool, app) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
